title: Campfire Regen C
description: ❤️‍🔥 Campfires now regenerates your health when you are near ❤️‍🔥
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a45fc8bc0a0fd674282d50838fe1e2e130127d9.png) ## Campfire Regen C (Continuous) is here! **Campfire Regen C** adds Continuous Health Regeneration feature to vanilla campfires. Going near a Campfire will provide you Health Regeneration effect; as long as you are near. ### Features: - Campfires will regenerate your health when you are near them - Normal Campfires will grant you Regeneration I effect - Soul Campfires will grant you Regeneration II effect - Near = 8 blocks radius - Fully server side, no problem if also exist on client
![Gap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5244b01b6b693c802b514afc9e1562a6e786297.png) ❤️I will appreciate any amount of donation support to keep my modding work ongoing!❤️

![Gap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5244b01b6b693c802b514afc9e1562a6e786297.png) ## Latest Changes - **v1.0** - Released for 1.21.x - Will release for the next version tomorrow
